name: canlii-mcp
description: Local stdio MCP server for searching Canadian legal information via the CanLII API

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin main --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes -R mohammadfarooqi/canlii-mcp
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin main --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes -R mohammadfarooqi/canlii-mcp
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin main --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes -R mohammadfarooqi/canlii-mcp

author: Mohammad Farooqi
